title: VOLLUCK Glitter Spray 110 ML, Luminous Finish Body Shimmer Spray for Body, Face, Hair & Clothes, Instant Sparkle for Parties, Christmas, Birthdays & Celebrations (Light Blue)

features: Shine Bright Instantly: Transform your look in seconds! Our glitter spray delivers an ultra-fine shimmer that instantly adds a luminous sparkle to your hair and body. Whether you're heading to a party or a festival, this body glitter spray helps you stand out with ease and elegance.

Easy & Even Application: Our glitter spray features a fine-mist nozzle that provides smooth, even coverage without clumping or stickiness. Just shake well and spray from a distance for a perfect, streak-free finish—no brushes or tools required. Its lightweight, non-greasy formula feels comfortable throughout the day.

Suitable for Use on All Body Areas: This versatile body shimmer spray works beautifully on hair, face, shoulders, arms, and legs. Whether you want a subtle shimmer or a dazzling shine, you can easily tailor your look to match any occasion.

Easy to Remove, No Mess: Our glitter spray stays put during your celebrations but rinses off effortlessly with water. No makeup removers needed—ideal for both everyday sparkle and special occasions without any hassle.

Ideal for Every Occasion: From music festivals, costume parties, and cosplay events to Halloween, Christmas, and New Year’s Eve, this glitter spray for hair and body adds the sparkle to any event. Suitable for adults and teens, it’s the ideal accessory to make your look shine on any special occasion.
description: Add instant sparkle to your look with the VOLLUCK Body Glitter Spray (110ml) – your ultimate beauty essential for festivals, parties, photoshoots and more. Whether you want to shimmer under the lights or glow in the sun, this spray brings dazzling effects to your skin, hair, and clothing in just seconds. Why You’ll Love It: Shine Bright Instantly: Transform your look in seconds! Our glitter spray delivers an ultra-fine shimmer that instantly adds a luminous sparkle to your hair and body. Whether you're heading to a party or a festival, this body glitter spray helps you stand out with ease and elegance. Easy & Even Application: Our glitter spray features a fine-mist nozzle that provides smooth, even coverage without clumping or stickiness. Just shake well and spray from a distance for a perfect, streak-free finish—no brushes or tools required. Its lightweight, non-greasy formula feels comfortable throughout the day. Suitable for Use on All Body Areas: This versatile body shimmer spray works beautifully on hair, face, shoulders, arms, and legs. Whether you want a subtle shimmer or a dazzling shine, you can easily tailor your look to match any occasion. Easy to Remove, No Mess: Our glitter spray stays put during your celebrations but rinses off effortlessly with water. No makeup removers needed—ideal for both everyday sparkle and special occasions without any hassle. Ideal for Every Occasion: From music festivals, costume parties, and cosplay events to Halloween, Christmas, and New Year’s Eve, this glitter spray for hair and body adds the sparkle to any event. Suitable for adults and teens, it’s the ideal accessory to make your look shine on any special occasion. How to Use: Shake well before use. Hold the bottle around 15–20cm away from the area. Spray a light, even layer on dry skin or hair. Let it dry for a few seconds. You’re ready to shine!
